{"code": "from calculator import add, subtract, multiply, divide

print("Çarpma (6 * 7):", multiply(6, 7))
print("Bölme (8 / 2):", divide(8, 2))
print("Sıfıra Bölme (9 / 0):", divide(9, 0))
"}
